scenario: Windows target CLI evidence shows installed BT Gun VJoy package, PnP device, HID/game-controller enumeration, and package metadata.
blocking_notes: Passed 2026-06-10 with the latest test-signed 0.6.2.2 identity package installed on the Windows target. Known caveat kept for follow-up: direct bridge helper STATUS/SUBMIT_INPUT probe returned ERR 0x00000057 after reinstall, while PnP/HID enumeration and phase approval passed.

scenario: Windows Game Controllers GUI lists the VHF-backed virtual joystick and exposes six buttons plus X/Y and Rx/Ry aim axes.
evidence_refs: joy-cpl:aim axes shown as Rotation X/Y per Rx/Ry descriptor
blocking_notes: Passed from user-provided visual confirmation. Rotation X/Y is expected for aim because the descriptor maps aim to Rx/Ry while physical stick remains X/Y.

scenario: Live paired Android app and physical iPega gun move Windows-visible BT Gun VJoy controls.
blocking_notes: Passed by user Phase 6 approval after live target testing. Replay, fixture, fake state, and stub paths were not used as the final acceptance signal.

scenario: Real Windows HID output report path is accepted for v1 output-to-phone-haptic closeout.
blocking_notes: Passed by user Phase 6 approval. No raw output logs, pairing material, image captures, or haptic secrets are committed.

scenario: Committed manifest and evidence refs contain only sanitized Phase 6 status metadata.
